finding.root_cause_summary: Task.java imports org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.expression.function.CurrentTimestampFunction, an internal Hibernate 5 implementation class. After the recipe upgrades Spring Boot to 3.3 (which bundles Hibernate 6), this internal package was removed, so both the import (line 13) and the @ColumnDefault(CurrentTimestampFunction.NAME) usage (line 45) fail to compile.
finding.fix_hint: Replace CurrentTimestampFunction.NAME with the literal string "current_timestamp" and delete the import on line 13.
